The authorization logic does not enforce resource-level permission checks for `/mlflow-artifacts/mpu/*` endpoints, enabling attackers to overwrite artifacts belonging to other users. This can lead to unauthorized cross-user writes, model supply chain poisoning, and arbitrary code execution when compromised models are loaded. The issue is resolved in version 3.10.0.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00345, "percentile": 0.26508}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8c7q-86fq-vvmh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T16:48:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8c7q-86fq-vvmh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8c7q-86fq-vvmh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-2651"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-25T07:16:15Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T13:30:39Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2651", "https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow/commit/d7290811d8f3c95366d80109424edc1fb1ad966f", "https://huntr.com/bounties/65beb119-d3e0-4e03-af2f-fa98f78f83dc", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-2651", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2481117", "https://security.access.redhat.com/data/csaf/v2/vex/2026/cve-2026-2651.json", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8c7q-86fq-vvmh"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow", "summary": "MLflow allows unauthorized access to multipart upload endpoints when the `--serve-artifacts` mode is enabled", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T16:48:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8c7q-86fq-vvmh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.11.0rc1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "mlflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.11.0rc0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MLflow allows unauthorized access to multipart upload endpoints when the `--serve-artifacts` mode is enabled
